title: Berserk Guts Set
description: This Pack add Sword DragonSlayer and full Armor of Berserk Manga
body:
# Berserk Set
## All textures are on netherite set !

**Crossbow of Guts :**
[https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/berserk-guts-crossbow](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/berserk-guts-crossbow)

**My Berserk collection :**

-Casca / Femto / Griffith Set ...

-Sun/Moon Berserk Eclipse

[https://modrinth.com/collection/6BJZzqaS](https://modrinth.com/collection/6BJZzqaS)

**Place Sword on head :**

/item replace entity Name armor.head from entity Name weapon

/give @p netherite_sword[equippable={slot:"head"}]
